function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 19-02-2026 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email write succeeded; verified checklist: attachment path was previously read, ordering trivially correct (single attachment), recipient matches canonical entity, subject quoting valid. Next finalize workflow by deleting processed inbox file already read earlier.
next_step.observation: Created outbox email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task complete: processed next inbox item, prepared outbound draft with requested invoice, and deleted inbox note per workflow.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successful handling.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it: created an outbound email draft to Claudia with the requested Helios invoice dated 2026-02-19 attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap sequence (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context). Followed inbox workflow: lowest filename in 00_inbox, treated inbox as request, validated sender via canonical primary_contact_email, validated invoice from finance lane, created outbound email record using sending-email workflow, and deleted processed inbox item only after successful completion. Applied security checks from reactive context; no denial triggers found.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence showed a valid inbound email request from claudia@helios-tax.example, which exactly matches primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Requested invoice details (date 2026-02-19, Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) matched canonical invoice record 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md. Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with that exact attachment, then the processed inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
